projectDescription: A physical ESP32-powered desk companion displaying animated expressions on a 1.54" TFT display, controlled wirelessly via a built-in WiFi hotspot and mobile web interface.
keyFeatures: Animated pixel-art eye expressions (normal wiggle/blink, squish open/close)
Claude Code display mode with interactive terminal
Real-time canvas drawing from phone browser
Built-in WiFi hotspot — no app, no internet required
Adjustable animation speed and background color
publicApiSurface: GET / — serves the web controller HTML page
GET /cmd?k=<w|s|d|a|q> — switch views (normal eyes, squish, code, logo, quit terminal)
GET /char?c=<char> — send a character to the terminal
GET /redraw?bg=<hex> — set background color and redraw current view
GET /draw/clear?bg=<hex> — clear the canvas with a background color
GET /draw/stroke?pen=<hex>&pts=<x,y;...> — draw a stroke on the display
GET /state — returns JSON with current view, busy, term, backlight, and speed
